navbar.skipLink.description: Accessibility skip link — keyboard-only, visible on focus, allows users to bypass navigation.
navbar.skipLink.notes: Must convey 'jump past navigation to main content'. Keep very short.

navbar.brand.description: The portfolio owner's name used as the navbar logo/home link.
navbar.brand.notes: This is a proper name — do not translate or transliterate.

navbar.brandAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the navbar logo link. Describes the destination.
navbar.brandAriaLabel.notes: Conveys 'click to go to homepage'. The name must not be translated.

navbar.navAriaLabel.description: ARIA label for the main <nav> landmark.
navbar.navAriaLabel.notes: Screen readers announce this when the user navigates to the nav landmark.

navbar.home.description: Navigation link label for the home page.

navbar.resume.description: Navigation link label for the resume/CV page.
navbar.resume.notes: Use the most natural term for a professional CV/résumé in the target language.

navbar.openMenu.description: ARIA label for the mobile hamburger button when the menu is closed.

navbar.closeMenu.description: ARIA label for the mobile hamburger button when the menu is open.

navbar.mobileAriaLabel.description: ARIA label for the mobile navigation menu container.

navbar.languageSwitcher.description: ARIA label for the language switcher control.

footer.copyright.description: Copyright notice in the page footer. Includes the current year, owner name, and location.
footer.copyright.notes: {{year}} is injected at runtime. The name and location must not be translated.

footer.linkedin.description: Link text for the LinkedIn icon link in the footer.

footer.linkedinAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the LinkedIn footer link. Describes destination and behavior.
footer.linkedinAriaLabel.notes: Must indicate it opens in a new tab.

dates.present.description: The word 'Present' used in employment date ranges to indicate a current role (e.g. 'March 2021 – Present').
dates.present.notes: Use the most natural word for 'current / ongoing' in employment context.
